ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migration_data" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration record */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code for the state where the migration data was collected */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code for the district where the migration data was collected */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., STATE - TAMIL NADU 33) */,
  "duration_of_residence" TEXT /* Duration of residence (e.g., All durations of residence) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the migrant (e.g., All ages, 0-14, 15-19) */,
  "migration_date" TEXT /* Date when the migration data was collected */,
  "last_residence_state_code" INTEGER /* State code of the last residence */,
  "last_residence_district_code" INTEGER /* District code of the last residence */,
  "migration_type" TEXT /* Type of migration (e.g., internal, international) */,
  "migration_status" TEXT /* Status of the migration (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_last_residence_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("last_residence_state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_data_last_residence_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("last_residence_district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason (e.g., Work/Employment, Business, Education) */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reason for migration */,
  "reason_category" TEXT /* Category of the reason (e.g., economic, social, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration detail record */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration record */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reason for migration */,
  "total_migrants" INTEGER /* Total number of migrants */,
  "male_migrants" INTEGER /* Number of male migrants */,
  "female_migrants" INTEGER /* Number of female migrants */,
  "total_migrants_last_year" INTEGER /* Total number of migrants in the last year */,
  "male_migrants_last_year" INTEGER /* Number of male migrants in the last year */,
  "female_migrants_last_year" INTEGER /* Number of female migrants in the last year */,
  "migration_trend" TEXT /* Trend of migration (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of migrants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_details_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES migration_reasons ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_details_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migration_data ("migration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the district belongs to */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "district_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)
